error_signature: redirecting to default page due to private route
title: Redirecting to default page due to private route access
symptom: After clicking the password reset link, users are redirected to the default page instead of the intended confirm-new-password page.
applies_when: User is not logged in during password reset
not_this_if: The confirm-new-password page is set to public
root_cause: The confirm-new-password page is configured as a private route, requiring authentication to access. Since the user is not logged in during the password reset process, they are redirected to the default page instead.
fix_steps: Change the confirm-new-password page settings to public
Ensure that the page can be accessed without authentication
Test the password reset flow again
agent_instruction: Set the confirm-new-password page to public to allow access without authentication.
